backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that includes blob storage functionality via a MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the fullscreen overlay navbar feature to its implementation file (Navbar.tsx) with associated components, test IDs, and high confidence rating.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'AI Video Agency' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (Navbar, Hero, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact, Footer) with section IDs for smooth-scroll navigation.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component with a validated multi-field form (name, email, company, service, message), a simulated async submission with success state, and a sidebar displaying contact info.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with agency branding, smooth-scroll navigation links, service links, social media icon buttons, and a bottom bar with dynamic copyright year and attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section featuring an auto-rotating animated headline word, tagline, dual CTA buttons, a cinematic background image with gradient overlays, and ambient animated orbs.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with smooth scroll links, a mobile hamburger menu with animated overlay, scroll-based background change, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio section displaying four project cards with hover animations and a featured video placeholder, using scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Pricing section with three plan cards (Starter, Pro, Enterprise), a monthly/annual billing toggle, and scroll-animated reveal; the Pro plan is visually highlighted as most popular.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section rendering six service cards (AI Video Production, Script Writing, etc.) in a responsive grid with scroll-triggered animations and icon-based visuals.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials section displaying six client review cards with star ratings, quotes, and author info, each animated on scroll into view.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport, returning a ref and visibility boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind layers, and defines a deep cinematic dark-mode color palette using OKLCH CSS variables along with utility classes for glass cards, gradients, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, container queries, animation plugins, and design system values for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's build state including version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for a frontend AI video agency website clone inspired by Synima.
